assertionResults.reason: .github/workflows/ci.yml keeps deployability proof on gate-release/release_proof, while .github/workflows/release.yml states in its summary that it only generates release notes and does not prove deployability.

AGENTS.md and scripts/enforce_codex_review_policy.sh use the same narrow docs-only allowlist, include .factory/library/** explicitly, run bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh only, and classify markdown outside that allowlist as non-docs-only.

frictions: Task-based flow-validator subagents could not be used in this session because the configured user-testing-flow-validator droid reported an invalid model (gpt-5.4); the parent validator performed equivalent checks directly and captured the same artifacts.
